title: DFTO: tax strategy 2024 to 2025
body: "This annual report presents the tax strategy of DFT Operator Limited (DFTO), a wholly-owned company of the Secretary of State for Transport, for the financial year 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  It includes detailed information on the company and its subsidiaries’:   tax policy management of tax risks tax planning approach   "
